title: Silence Where the Prayer Used to Be
lyricSeed:
I knelt down but the words won't come
There's a silence where my prayer used to be
I'm calling out to an empty room
And the echo just calls back to me
Mama, I lost the voice you gave
Now I'm shouting at a sky that stays
Oh, the quiet is so loud tonight
Save me, somebody, if you can
